description_long: This object is a realistic doll head featuring a detailed human-like face with fair skin, subtle freckles, and pronounced cheekbones. The doll has short, tousled brown hair with visible individual strands, giving it a textured and natural appearance. The eyes are deeply set, with dark eyebrows and a focused, intense gaze. The lips are closed and the jawline is well-defined, contributing to a lifelike and expressive look. The scalp and hair are sculpted with attention to volume and layering, while the ears are partially visible beneath the hair. No visible clothing or accessories are present, and the neck is truncated, indicating this is a head-only doll component.
description: A realistic doll head with short, tousled brown hair, fair skin, and a lifelike, expressive face. The head features detailed facial features and textured hair, with no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's intense facial expression, detailed eyes, eyebrows, and the parted, textured hair.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the layered hair texture, ear partially visible, and the profile of the face.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full volume and layering of the brown hair, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the hair's texture and layering, with the ear and facial profile partially visible.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; only the head and neck are present.
attribute_pose: Head is upright and facing forward, with no visible body, arms, or legs. The neck is truncated and there is no dynamic movement.
attribute_facial_expression: Frowning expression with furrowed brows, slightly narrowed eyes, and closed lips, conveying a serious or intense mood.
attribute_hair_style: Short, tousled brown hair with a layered, slightly messy texture and natural volume.
